name: Global Satellite Foot Traffic
description: Anonymized foot traffic counts for 500K+ retail locations derived from satellite and mobile data.
longDescription: Orbital Insight's foot traffic dataset combines satellite imagery analysis with anonymized mobile device signals to produce daily visitor estimates across 500,000+ retail locations in the US, Europe, and Asia-Pacific. The data is aggregated at the store level with no personally identifiable information. Each observation includes a normalized visit count, year-over-year delta, and a confidence score indicating signal strength. The dataset is widely used for nowcasting quarterly revenue of consumer-facing companies, tracking post-pandemic recovery trends, and building short-term trading signals around earnings dates.

fields.name: location_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the retail location

sla.freshness: T+1 (data available by 06:00 UTC next day)
sla.revisionPolicy: Last 7 days may be revised. Older data is immutable.

codeExamples.label: Python
codeExamples.code:
from altalpha import DataClient

client = DataClient(api_key="YOUR_KEY")

# Query foot traffic for Walmart locations
df = client.query(
    dataset="orbital-insight/foot-traffic",
    filters={
        "ticker": "WMT",
        "date_gte": "2025-01-01",
        "date_lte": "2025-01-31",
    },
    fields=["date", "location_id", "visit_count", "visit_count_yoy"],
)

print(f"Records: {len(df)}")
print(df.head())

codeExamples.label: C#
SQL
codeExamples.code:
-- Direct SQL access via Snowflake share
SELECT
    date,
    ticker,
    AVG(visit_count) AS avg_visits,
    AVG(visit_count_yoy) AS avg_yoy_change
FROM altalpha.orbital_insight.foot_traffic
WHERE ticker = 'WMT'
  AND date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-01-31'
GROUP BY date, ticker
ORDER BY date;

lineage.description: Satellite imagery and anonymized mobile device signals collected from 80+ data partners across US, EU, and APAC.
Raw pings matched to 523K+ retail polygons using proprietary geofencing with 15m accuracy.
Visit counts normalized for panel bias, weather, and holidays. Year-over-year deltas computed against rolling 365-day baseline.
Each observation scored 0-1 based on signal density, device count, and satellite revisit frequency.
Locations mapped to equity tickers via proprietary entity resolution (3,217 tickers across 42 exchanges).
Automated outlier detection, completeness checks, and cross-validation against census baselines.
Published to REST API, Snowflake share, and bulk CSV endpoints. Webhooks fire on completion.

versionPolicy.deprecationPolicy: Prior major versions supported for 12 months after new major release. v2.x deprecated 2026-03-01.
versionPolicy.breakingChanges: v3.0 changed visit_count from raw to normalized. v3.2 added confidence field. See changelog for migration guide.
versionPolicy.revisionWindow: Last 7 calendar days may be revised as late-arriving device data is incorporated. Data older than 7 days is immutable.

compliance.regulatoryClassification: Alternative Data - Non-PII aggregate statistics derived from anonymized mobile signals. No individual tracking.
compliance.dataRetentionPolicy: Full historical archive maintained indefinitely. Clients may request data deletion for their query logs after 90 days.

knownLimitations: Coverage gaps in rural areas with low device density (confidence < 0.5)
Holiday normalization may undercount Black Friday / Boxing Day traffic
New store openings have no YoY baseline for first 365 days
APAC coverage limited to Tier 1 cities before 2021
Ticker mapping covers ~65% of locations; unmapped locations have null ticker field
backtestGuide.lookbackRequired: 365 days minimum for YoY signal stability
backtestGuide.warmupPeriod: 30 days recommended to establish baseline panel composition

license: Enterprise License. Data may not be redistributed. Derived signals may be used in proprietary trading strategies without restriction.
